query:
-- Verify: PA reps (Ryan=WA, Daniel=NSW/VIC/SA/TAS, Leo=national) should have zero bess/pal/pumps in their pool
-- Check Ryan's territory for bess/pal/pumps leakage
SELECT 'ryan_leak' as rep, COUNT(*) as leaked
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND p.productLane IN ('bess','pal','pumps')

UNION ALL

-- Check Daniel's territory for bess/pal/pumps leakage
SELECT 'daniel_leak', COUNT(*)
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND p.productLane IN ('bess','pal','pumps')

UNION ALL

-- Check Brett's territory for portable_air leakage (pump-only rep)
SELECT 'brett_pa_leak', COUNT(*)
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.projectState IN ('WA','NT') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND p.productLane = 'portable_air';
